schedules.label: Nightly knowledge consolidation
schedules.description: At 4am, scans library/ for unprocessed sources and compiles them into library/wiki/.
schedules.prompt: Run knowledge consolidation: spawn the knowledge-consolidator agent to scan library/ for new source files (ignoring the wiki/ subdirectory which holds processed output), compile them into library/wiki/ (summaries, concepts, connections), and update library/wiki/index.md.

setup_scripts.label: Initialize library directories
setup_scripts.description: Creates library/wiki/ and a starter index so the consolidator has somewhere to read and write. Raw sources go directly under library/ — no separate raw/ subfolder.
setup_scripts.command:
mkdir -p library/wiki && [ -f library/wiki/index.md ] || printf '# Knowledge wiki

Compiled from sources dropped in library/ — auto-maintained by the knowledge-consolidator agent.
' > library/wiki/index.md
